data.title: pre-bash-dispatcher: test_pre_bash_dispatcher_record_test_status_direct_call_blocked -> exits 0 instead of exit 2
data.description:
## Observed Behavior
test_pre_bash_dispatcher_record_test_status_direct_call_blocked fails: expected exit 2, actual exit 0. Confirmed pre-existing — fails on baseline before epic c804-9ccf changes.

## Expected Behavior
When record-test-status.sh is called directly from the pre-bash dispatcher context, it should be blocked with exit 2.

## Steps to Reproduce
bash tests/hooks/test-pre-bash-dispatcher.sh

## Root Cause Hypothesis
The blocking mechanism for direct record-test-status.sh calls from dispatcher contexts may have regressed or was never correctly implemented.
